suggestions: Build and deploy a complex, full-stack application that integrates all your current skills (React, Node, and SQL) into a single portfolio project to demonstrate end-to-end development proficiency.

alternative_careers.description: Strong match for your Python + database skills.

strategy: You should prioritize **Backend Development** because your current proficiency in Node.js, Python, and SQL provides a near-complete toolkit for this role, offering the highest immediate reward for the least additional effort. While Data Engineering is lucrative, it would require significant retraining in specialized pipeline tools and infrastructure that your current stack lacks. Focusing on backend allows you to leverage your React knowledge as a competitive edge in cross-functional teams while securing a core role much faster.
explanation: While your perfect task completion and relevant tech stack demonstrate great discipline, your 42% probability reflects a need to translate these individual skills into a cohesive, high-impact project portfolio that proves your real-world problem-solving abilities. You have built a strong foundation, and by focusing now on mock interviews and professional networking, you will bridge the gap between being a disciplined student and a top-tier hire.
